problem id: 0f0e199c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) XOR SHL(2)

examples:
  01000001 -> 00001110
  00000110 -> 00101000
  10101010 -> 11111101
  01101001 -> 11101111
  10100100 -> 10110101
  01001100 -> 01010010
  11100010 -> 10011111
  01010111 -> 11100110
  00000011 -> 00010100

query: 11111110
predicted answer: 00001111
